official_functions.role: Provide the official Protocol 775 Configuration serverbound keep_alive input id, framed payload, packet table id, and body bytes.

invariants: The runtime-send probe reads the keep-alive input id from the existing official answer artifact.
The runtime-send probe reads the official Configuration serverbound framed keep_alive payload from the existing official answer artifact.
With compression threshold disabled, the observed TcpStream bytes must be VarInt(length of official framed payload) followed by the official framed payload.
This contract tests packet::send_keep_alive as an outgoing helper in State::Configuration only.
This contract does not prove spawn_reader echo behavior or initialized runtime keep-alive reaction.
test_topology_note: This runtime metadata is stored below oracle/*/775/runtime and is not currently discovered by the jar-backed direct-file runner.
stop_boundary: Do not use this helper-send probe to infer full login/configuration runtime behavior, Configuration completion, or Play readiness.
